targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[5].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) / sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) > 0

100 * sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[4].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) / sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) > 0

100 * sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[4].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) / sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri) > 0
sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[2-3].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri, status) > 0
sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[4].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri, status) > 0
sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*", status=~"[5].*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (application, method, uri, status) > 0

sum by (application, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (application, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!~".*(prometheus|health).*"}[$__rate_interval]))
